rows.label: qev012402_MSG0001
rows.name:
Stay baaack!! I don't want to
die being eaten by a Saltat!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012402_MSG0002
rows.name:
Howard... If you have time to
scream, go defeat the native
creatures, you useless coward.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012402_MSG0003
rows.name:
There's no way I can handle that
many alone! I'll just get eaten![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012402_MSG0004
rows.name:
In the first place, isn't this
all because you messed up the
piloting and crashed us here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012402_MSG0005
rows.name:
And didn't that happen because
you wouldn't stop complaining
and started a fight![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012402_MSG0007
rows.name:
50 meters left until the end of our lives.
If it means I don't have to listen to your
nagging anymore, I'll be relieved.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012402_MSG0009
rows.name:
If we keep making a ruckus like this,
the Saltats might run away, or someone
might come help us, right?[ST:wait ]
